name: Dine Brands Global, Inc.
business: Dine Brands Global, Inc. owns and franchises the IHOP (family dining), Applebee's (casual dining), and Fuzzy's Taco Shop (fast-casual) restaurant concepts. The substantial majority of its 3,509 restaurants are operated by independent franchisees. Revenue is primarily derived from royalties, advertising fees, and company-owned restaurant operations.

exposures.sentence: a $1.0 million write off of an investment the Company had in a robotic automation company focused on developing automation solutions for the food industry.
The rapid evolution and increased adoption of artificial intelligence technologies may intensify our cybersecurity risks.

The occurrence of cyber incidents, or a deficiency in our cybersecurity, could negatively impact our business by causing a disruption to our operations, a compromise or corruption of our confidential information, and/or damage to our employee and business relationships, all of which could subject us to loss and harm our brands.

Our delivery initiatives and use of third-party delivery vendors subjects us and our franchisees to a variety of risks related to the delivery of our products by third parties and may not generate expected returns.
